execution_mode.title: Execution mode
execution_mode.description: Choose current mode for recent pages or historic mode for deep pagination.

historic_cutoff_date.title: Historic cutoff date
historic_cutoff_date.description: Required for historic mode. ISO 8601 timestamp; stop when articles are older than this value.

max_items_per_site.title: Article limit per site
max_items_per_site.description: Per-site article cap when no limit is disabled.

proxy_config.title: Proxy configuration
proxy_config.description: Select Apify Proxy or provide custom proxy URLs for difficult sites.

site_category_filters.title: Advanced: manual site category filters
site_category_filters.description: Optional legacy override. Prefer categories_to_scrape dropdown above.
